description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses hugomods/hugo:exts as the default Docker image, runs a before_script installing go with "apk add --no-cache go" and updating Hugo modules via "hugo mod get -u ./...", and caches the Go module directory "/go/pkg/mod" and generated resources "resources/_gen" keyed by ${CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG}. Add a test stage containing a link-check job that overrides the image to lycheeverse/lychee:latest, is allowed to fail, runs only on branches that are not the default branch, and executes "lychee --verbose --no-progress --exclude-mail 'content/**/*.md' 'README.md' 'CONTRIBUTING.md'". Also in the test stage add a test job that runs "hugo --printPathWarnings --printUnusedTemplates" on non-default branches. Finally, add a deploy stage with a create-pages job that inherits the default image and before_script, runs "hugo", publishes the "public" directory as a pages artifact, sets the environment to production, and runs only when the commit branch equals the default branch.
